'''ngoyashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:byblidaceous|byblidaceous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-y-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:byblidaceous|byblidaceous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngoyashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngoyashithi|ngoyashithi]] || [[word:ngoyashiji|ngoyashiji]] || [[word:ngoyashishi|ngoyashishi]] || [[word:ngoyashiki|ngoyashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngoyashuthuthu|ngoyashuthuthu]] || [[word:ngoyashujuju|ngoyashujuju]] || [[word:ngoyashushushu|ngoyashushushu]] || [[word:ngoyashukuku|ngoyashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngoyashuthu|ngoyashuthu]] || [[word:ngoyashuju|ngoyashuju]] || [[word:ngoyashushu|ngoyashushu]] || [[word:ngoyashuku|ngoyashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngoyashufthuf|ngoyashufthuf]] || [[word:ngoyashufjuf|ngoyashufjuf]] || [[word:ngoyashufshuf|ngoyashufshuf]] || [[word:ngoyashufkuf|ngoyashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngoyashethe|ngoyashethe]] || [[word:ngoyasheje|ngoyasheje]] || [[word:ngoyasheshe|ngoyasheshe]] || [[word:ngoyasheke|ngoyasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngoyashothotho|ngoyashothotho]] || [[word:ngoyashojojo|ngoyashojojo]] || [[word:ngoyashoshosho|ngoyashoshosho]] || [[word:ngoyashokoko|ngoyashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngoyashotho|ngoyashotho]] || [[word:ngoyashojo|ngoyashojo]] || [[word:ngoyashosho|ngoyashosho]] || [[word:ngoyashoko|ngoyashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngoyashofthof|ngoyashofthof]] || [[word:ngoyashofjof|ngoyashofjof]] || [[word:ngoyashofshof|ngoyashofshof]] || [[word:ngoyashofkof|ngoyashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngoyashĂŻfthĂŻf|ngoyashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoyashĂŻfjĂŻf|ngoyashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoyashĂŻfshĂŻf|ngoyashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoyashĂŻfkĂŻf|ngoyashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngoyashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngoyashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoyashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngoyashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoyashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngoyashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoyashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngoyashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngoyashĂŻfthĂŻf|ngoyashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoyashĂŻfjĂŻf|ngoyashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoyashĂŻfshĂŻf|ngoyashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoyashĂŻfkĂŻf|ngoyashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngoyashĂŻfthĂŻf|ngoyashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoyashĂŻfjĂŻf|ngoyashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoyashĂŻfshĂŻf|ngoyashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngoyashĂŻfkĂŻf|ngoyashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngoyashĂŠthĂŠ|ngoyashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngoyashĂŠjĂŠ|ngoyashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngoyashĂŠshĂŠ|ngoyashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngoyashĂŠkĂŠ|ngoyashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngoyashathatha|ngoyashathatha]] || [[word:ngoyashajaja|ngoyashajaja]] || [[word:ngoyashashasha|ngoyashashasha]] || [[word:ngoyashakaka|ngoyashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngoyashatha|ngoyashatha]] || [[word:ngoyashaja|ngoyashaja]] || [[word:ngoyashasha|ngoyashasha]] || [[word:ngoyashaka|ngoyashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngoyashafthaf|ngoyashafthaf]] || [[word:ngoyashafjaf|ngoyashafjaf]] || [[word:ngoyashafshaf|ngoyashafshaf]] || [[word:ngoyashafkaf|ngoyashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngoyashasha|ngoyashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngoyashĂ«sha|ngoyashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngoyashrosha|ngoyashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngoyashmusha|ngoyashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngoyashyasha|ngoyashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongoyashnkshĂ«sha|gongoyashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongoyashnkrosha|gongoyashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongoyashnkmusha|gongoyashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongoyashnkyasha|gongoyashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngoyayashasha|ngoyayashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngoyayashĂ«sha|ngoyayashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngoyayashrosha|ngoyayashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngoyayashmusha|ngoyayashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngoyayashyasha|ngoyayashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongoyayashnkshĂ«sha|gongoyayashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongoyayashnkrosha|gongoyayashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongoyayashnkmusha|gongoyayashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongoyayashnkyasha|gongoyayashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngeyĂŠshasha|ngeyĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngeyĂŠshĂ«sha|ngeyĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngeyĂŠshrosha|ngeyĂŠshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngeyĂŠshmusha|ngeyĂŠshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngeyĂŠshyasha|ngeyĂŠshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongeyĂŠshnkshĂ«sha|gongeyĂŠshnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongeyĂŠshnkrosha|gongeyĂŠshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongeyĂŠshnkmusha|gongeyĂŠshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongeyĂŠshnkyasha|gongeyĂŠshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngoyfashasha|ngoyfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngoyfashĂ«sha|ngoyfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngoyfashrosha|ngoyfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngoyfashmusha|ngoyfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngoyfashyasha|ngoyfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongoyfashnkshĂ«sha|gongoyfashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongoyfashnkrosha|gongoyfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongoyfashnkmusha|gongoyfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongoyfashnkyasha|gongoyfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|92df33c}}
